title: PVC Twin Half Mask
shortDescription:
Soft PVC mask with deep face mould for a comfortable fit 
with an excellent seal. Dual wide elastic headband connected with a pin swivel 
connector, adjustable & with a quick release toggle. Efficient exhalation mask

features:
Soft PVC mask with deep face mould for a comfortable fit

For use with the DHCT twin unifit filter cartridge system
